meaning: n.<美> (美国南北战争时的)南军士兵
examples: The Talmud adds that the sage Reb Meir Baal HaNess was a prominent supporter of the Bar Kokhba rebellion against Roman rule.
Reb a is the sweet component of the stevia plant most often used in stevia sweeteners.
Danny is the son of Reb Saunders, the pious and revered head of a great Hasidic dynasty.
